_meta.description: Manual overrides for disease leaves where the dominant standard-of-care exists OUTSIDE our 72-config coverage universe. Pure-derived status (branded_incumbent when any covered drug has salesM>0) overrides these. Anything not listed defaults to 'novel' (no approved drug exists for this leaf in any company).
rules: generic_incumbent: dominant SoC is generic / off-patent (e.g. levodopa for PD)
branded_incumbent_external: approved branded drug(s) exist for this leaf but the sponsor is not in our coverage manifest
Audit guardrail: a leaf flagged here should have >=1 pipeline candidate in coverage; otherwise the leaf shouldn't exist in the data at all

generic_incumbent.cns.neurodegeneration.parkinson_disease: levodopa / carbidopa, dopamine agonists, MAO-B inhibitors (generics)

branded_incumbent_external.oncology.hematology.bpdcn: Elzonris / tagraxofusp (Stemline / Menarini -- not in coverage)
branded_incumbent_external.oncology.musculoskeletal.tgct: Turalio / pexidartinib (Daiichi -- in coverage but TGCT-tagged at pipeline-stage Pimicotinib)
branded_incumbent_external.ophthalmology.anterior_neuro.dry_eye: Restasis, Xiidra, Miebo (multiple -- generic + branded mix)
branded_incumbent_external.respiratory.inflammatory.severe_asthma: Dupixent, Tezspire, Nucala, Xolair, Fasenra (branded biologics, partial coverage)
branded_incumbent_external.cns.epilepsy.dee.dravet: Diacomit / stiripentol, Epidiolex / cannabidiol, Fintepla / fenfluramine (multiple)
branded_incumbent_external.cns.sleep.narcolepsy_hypersomnia: Xywav / Xyrem (Jazz -- not in coverage), modafinil generic
branded_incumbent_external.dermatology.rare_skin.vitiligo: Opzelura / ruxolitinib (Incyte -- not in coverage as commercial vitiligo asset)
branded_incumbent_external.oncology.hematology.nhl.tcell: Adcetris / brentuximab vedotin, Beleodaq / belinostat (multiple, partial coverage)
